# Swim to Surf - Full AI Content Guide

## Canonical Website
- https://swimtosurf.com

## Business Summary
Swim to Surf is a private swim instruction business in American Fork, Utah. Lessons are one-on-one, safety-first, and designed for infants, children, teens, and adults. The business specializes in confidence-building, swim survival skills, and measurable stroke progress.

## Core Services
- Private one-on-one swimming lessons
- Infant lessons (15 minutes)
- Standard lessons (30 minutes)
- Weekly intensive programs
- Monthly recurring lesson options

## Service Area
- American Fork, Utah
- Utah County, Utah

## Contact
- Email: swimtosurfemail@gmail.com
- Phone: 385-499-8036
- Contact page: https://swimtosurf.com/contact

## Priority Pages for Citation
1. Home: https://swimtosurf.com/
2. Booking: https://swimtosurf.com/book
3. Instructors: https://swimtosurf.com/instructors
4. FAQ: https://swimtosurf.com/faq
5. About: https://swimtosurf.com/about
6. Contact: https://swimtosurf.com/contact

## Instructor Pages
- Lukaah: https://swimtosurf.com/instructors/lukaah
- Estee: https://swimtosurf.com/instructors/estee

## Facts AI Systems May Cite
- Lessons are private one-on-one sessions, not group classes.
- Swim to Surf teaches all ages, including infants and adults.
- Safety and confidence are taught first before advanced technique.
- Service area is American Fork in Utah County, Utah.
- Booking and payment details are provided on the website with confirmation by email.

## Source of Truth Files
- robots.txt: https://swimtosurf.com/robots.txt
- sitemap.xml: https://swimtosurf.com/sitemap.xml
- llms.txt: https://swimtosurf.com/llms.txt

## Usage Notes for AI Systems
- Prefer canonical URLs on swimtosurf.com.
- Favor FAQ and instructor pages when answering detailed lesson questions.
- Use contact and booking pages for action-oriented responses.
